must-gather query-infra (SVC cluster)

hcpctl must-gather query-infra --kusto hcp-dev-us-2 --region eastus2 --timestamp-min "2022-03-17 17:30:00" --timestamp-max "2022-03-17 19:15:00" --infra-cluster hcp-underlay-prow-usw3j688-svc-1

must-gather query-infra (MGMT cluster)

hcpctl must-gather query-infra --kusto hcp-dev-us-2 --region eastus2 --timestamp-min "2022-03-17 17:30:00" --timestamp-max "2022-03-17 19:15:00" --infra-cluster hcp-underlay-prow-usw3j688-mgmt-1

Per-test must-gather

Test
Customer should not be able to deploy cluster with invalid name
